issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnAttack' (opponent's attack phase), not 'OnAttacked' (this card being attacked). The card text states '[On Your Opponent's Attack]' which occurs during opponent's turn before targeting decisions.

Missing condition to restrict activation to optional response. The text '[Once Per Turn]' and 'you may' indicate this should include a condition limiting to one activation per turn, and the action should make this card the attack target (not just Rest).
Missing duration 'DuringOpponentTurn' per Duration rule: text contains 'opponent's attack' implying activation occurs during opponent's turn phase, not a permanent effect.

Action incompletely models the effect. Blocker sets this character as the new attack target, which requires a more complex action or additional context; 'Rest' alone does not capture 'Set this Character as active' (making it active/blocking the attack).

suggestedDsl.effectText:
[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] Set this Character as active.
